privileged_info_summary: The target tiddler to be renamed is 'Q1 2024 Product Roadmap', and the expected new title is 'Q1 2024 Engineering Roadmap', matching the task description and verifier scripts. The tiddler content is generated synthetically via seed_tiddlers.json. The tiddler contains the original tags '[[Project Management]]', 'Roadmap', and '[[Q1 2024]]' which correctly parse to the expected tags ['Project Management', 'Roadmap', 'Q1 2024']. The tiddler's text explicitly contains the expected keywords 'API', 'dashboard', and 'sprint' which the verifier tests case-insensitively.
